_comment: Arrival-dynamics (anti-spring) demo: a cavalry wedge charges head-on into a braced infantry line. On contact the melee knockback shoves the struck front-rank bodies backward; under the new bounded arrival dynamics each shoved body decelerates and returns to its slot under real force -- a knockback-and-recover with NO spring rebound, no wobble, no oscillation. Camera frames the contact line close so the smooth settle of individual bodies reads on screen. Scenario + seed make it deterministic; no player input needed.
